summary: Iteration 15 Testing Complete - Three BIQC Audit Fixes Verified. All 8 tests passed. Verified: 1) H3: fetchUserProfile in SupabaseAuthContext calls GET /api/auth/supabase/me to enrich user with DB values (role, subscription_tier, is_master_account), 2) F4: DashboardLayout uses user?.full_name for avatar initial (line 323), greeting (line 327), and dropdown (line 343), 3) F2: OnboardingWizard destructures deferOnboarding from useSupabaseAuth() and calls it on 'Save and continue later' button click before navigating to /advisor.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED H3: SupabaseAuthContext.js lines 124-146 - fetchUserProfile calls GET /api/auth/supabase/me with Bearer token
VERIFIED H3: SupabaseAuthContext.js lines 133-140 - Enriches user with dbUser.role, dbUser.subscription_tier, dbUser.is_master_account, dbUser.full_name, dbUser.company_name
VERIFIED H3: auth_supabase.py lines 261-268 - verify_supabase_token returns all required fields from DB
VERIFIED F4: DashboardLayout.js line 323 - Avatar initial uses user?.full_name?.charAt(0).toUpperCase()
VERIFIED F4: DashboardLayout.js line 327 - Greeting uses user?.full_name?.split(' ')[0]
VERIFIED F4: DashboardLayout.js line 343 - Dropdown shows user?.full_name
VERIFIED F2: OnboardingWizard.js line 33 - deferOnboarding destructured from useSupabaseAuth()
VERIFIED F2: OnboardingWizard.js line 729 - deferOnboarding() called on 'Save and continue later' button click
VERIFIED F2: SupabaseAuthContext.js lines 218-221 - deferOnboarding callback sets onboardingStatus to {completed: true, deferred: true}
VERIFIED F2: SupabaseAuthContext.js line 336 - deferOnboarding exposed in context value
VERIFIED: All three modified files pass ESLint with no errors
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 15 verified three targeted BIQC audit fixes. H3 fix: User enrichment from backend DB via /api/auth/supabase/me - this ensures role/subscription_tier/is_master_account come from authoritative DB source, not just session metadata. F4 fix: DashboardLayout correctly uses full_name instead of name. F2 fix: deferOnboarding bypasses ProtectedRoute gate by setting onboardingStatus.completed=true temporarily. No authentication was available to test live auth flow, but code analysis confirms correct implementation.

features_verified.H3_fetchUserProfile_enrichment: COMPLETE - GET /api/auth/supabase/me called, merges role/subscription_tier/is_master_account from DB
features_verified.F2_deferOnboarding_exposed: COMPLETE - Callback defined and exposed in SupabaseAuthContext
features_verified.F2_onboarding_wizard_calls_defer: COMPLETE - 'Save and continue later' calls deferOnboarding() before navigate('/advisor')
